Title: German (de) - UI Translation
Steps:
1. Change language to German
2. Navigate through main pages
3. Verify all UI elements translated
4. Check buttons, labels, messages
Expected Result:
- All UI text in German
- No English fallbacks visible
- Grammar correct

Title: German (de) - BOPIS Modal
Steps:
1. Open pickup modal
2. Check search placeholder
3. Check button labels
4. Check filter labels
5. Check location card content
Expected Result:
- Search placeholder translated
- All buttons in German
- No truncation issues

Title: Complete Flow - German
Steps:

2. Search for product
3. Add to cart
4. Start checkout
5. Select pickup
6. Complete as far as possible
Expected Result:
- Entire flow works in German
- All steps translated
- No errors or missing text

Title: Error Messages - Translated
Steps:
1. Set language (e.g., German)
2. Trigger validation error
3. Trigger form error
4. Verify error messages translated
Expected Result:
- Error messages in selected language
- No English errors shown
- Clear messaging

Title: Date Formatting - Locale
Steps:
1. View dates in German (DD.MM.YYYY)
2. View dates in US English (MM/DD/YYYY)
3. Verify locale-appropriate formatting
Expected Result:
- Dates match locale convention
- No hardcoded formats

Title: Number Formatting - Locale
Steps:
1. View prices in German (1.234,56)
2. View prices in English (1,234.56)
3. Verify decimal/thousand separators
Expected Result:
- Number format matches locale
- Currency displays correctly

Title: Text Truncation Check
Steps:
1. Switch through all 13 languages
2. Check button labels for truncation
3. Check navigation items
4. Check form labels
Expected Result:
- No truncated text
- All labels readable
- Ellipsis only where appropriate

Title: Layout Integrity - Long Text
Steps:
1. Test Finnish (long compounds)
2. Test German (long words)
3. Test Russian
4. Verify no broken layouts
Expected Result:
- Layouts remain intact
- Text wraps appropriately
- No overflow issues
